retrieved_result: Ask Dr. Vinny \"Home Learn Wine Ask Dr. Vinny Hello there! I'm Dr. Vinifera, or \"Vinny\" for short. Ask me your toughest wine questions, from the technical aspects of winemaking to the fine points of etiquette. I hope you find my answers educational and even amusing.
